settings.heading: Yak chews for Golden Retrievers who need calmer focus.
settings.subheading: Golden Retrievers often need a satisfying job after walks, training, or family activity. Prime Pet Food yak chews give them rawhide-free supervised enrichment with simple ingredients.
settings.estimate_note: Most Golden Retrievers do best with Large or Extra Large chews depending on chewing intensity.
settings.card_1_text: Breed matters, but chewing style matters more. Gentle, moderate, and power chewers need different size confidence.
settings.card_2_text: Prime Pet Food chews use yak milk, cow milk, lime juice, and salt. No rawhide or artificial fillers.
settings.card_3_text: Run the estimator once and your My Dog dashboard can remember size, duration, and reorder timing.
